turns.message: Which verses contain the exact phrase "still waters"?

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
Which verses contain the exact phrase "still waters"?

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

function.name: search_by_meaning
function.description: Search the Bible by meaning rather than exact words. Use this when the user describes a theme, feeling, or idea — like 'verses about courage' — instead of naming a verse. Returns the closest verses with a similarity score.

query.description: What the user is looking for, in plain words

function.name: places_for_passage
function.description: List the places named in a Bible passage. Use this when the user asks where something happened. Takes a verse reference like 'Acts 9:3'.

function.name: search_keyword
function.description: Find verses containing an exact word or phrase. Use this when the wording itself matters — a phrase someone remembers, a word being traced — rather than a theme or a reference.

query.description: The exact word or phrase to find

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
Which verses contain the exact phrase "still waters"?

Verses containing the words (KJV), 1 total:
Psalms 23:2: He maketh me to lie down in green pastures: he leadeth me beside the still waters.

message.content:
Based on a search, there is only one verse containing that exact phrase from the King James Version of the Bible:

> Psalm 23:2 "He maketh me to lie down in green pastures: he leadeth me beside the still waters."

There are several other verses about Jesus as the Good Shepherd or being at peace, but none contain those specific words.

hits.snippet: He maketh me to lie down in green pastures: he leadeth me beside the <mark>still</mark> <mark>waters</mark>.

text.KJV: He maketh me to lie down in green pastures: he leadeth me beside the still waters.

finalChatText:
YouWhich verses contain the exact phrase "still waters"?The modelBased on a search, there is only one verse containing that exact phrase from the King James Version of the Bible:

> Psalm 23:2 "He maketh me to lie down in green pastures: he leadeth me beside the still waters."

There are several other verses about Jesus as the Good Shepherd or being at peace, but none contain those specific words.
